key.name: show-link-preview
key.summary: Show a preview of the link

key.name: show-link-preview-image
key.summary: Show a preview image of the link

key.name: link-preview-image-background-size
key.summary: Background size of the preview image of the link

key.name: link-preview-exclusion-patterns
key.summary: Links matching these regex patterns will not have a preview
